items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario involving verification via registered email/SMS workflows. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of these workflows, nor is there any indication of how the scenario behavior can be confirmed or reported. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient details or endpoints to assert that the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
